title: NexCMS
tagline: Minimal headless CMS with a clean API and no-bloat philosophy.
description: NexCMS is a lightweight headless CMS built around a single principle: content as structured data, delivered through a clean REST API. No plugins, no page builder, no UI complexity — just content types, entries, and an API.
story: Built after one too many projects where the CMS was more complex than the app it was serving. NexCMS is the tool I wanted: define your content types, write your entries, get your data.
journey: NexCMS came from a recurring frustration with every headless CMS being either too simple (no schema definition) or too complex (a full platform with billing). I wanted something that fit in the middle: schema-defined content types, a clean API, and nothing else. The build was fast once I stopped trying to add features and focused on getting the core right.
forWho: Developers who need a lightweight, schema-defined headless CMS without the platform overhead of Contentful or Sanity.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Node.js + Express REST API. PostgreSQL for content storage. JWT authentication. No frontend — API-only by design.
